title: Conjure Adopt Manifest
description: Machine-readable inventory manifest produced by conjure adopt (Phase 21). Version 1.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the manifest was generated.

conjure_version.description: Conjure version that produced this manifest.

target.description: Absolute path to the repository root that was inventoried.

snapshot_path.description: Absolute path to the snapshot backup directory. Empty string at inventory time; filled by scripts/adopt.sh.

total_files.description: Number of files included in files[] array (after cap).

scan_capped.description: True when total_found > 500 and the scan was capped at 500 (D-08).

total_found.description: Raw count of markdown files found before the 500-file cap was applied (D-08).

core.description: Count of files classified as 'core' (CLAUDE.md, settings.json).

files.description: Per-file inventory entries (up to 500 entries per D-08).

path.description: Relative path from the repository root.

line_count.description: Number of lines in the file.

size_cap_exceeded.description: True when line_count exceeds the size cap for this file's classification (D-09). Named 'size_cap_exceeded', not 'cap_exceeded'.

size_cap_limit.description: The applicable line count cap for this file's classification. Null for buckets without a cap (reference-doc, planning-doc, unknown).

linked_from.description: List of files that link to this file. ['CLAUDE.md'] if linked via D-06 pass, else [].

size_cap_violations.description: Entries for files where size_cap_exceeded is true.

path.description: Relative path from the repository root.

line_count.description: Actual line count of the file.

cap.description: The applicable size cap that was exceeded.

overage.description: Number of lines over the cap (line_count - cap).

harness_missing_layers.description: List of harness layers not found in the repository (e.g. 'skills', 'agents').

restructure_steps.description: Proposed restructure steps. Always empty at inventory time; populated by the restructure skill in Phase 23.
